meta.boardSubtitle: Deliverables and RAAIDD control board for the WELTAY programme
meta.dataStatus: Test data only — not live project position

deliverables.title: Define WELTAY core value proposition
deliverables.description: Agree the single sentence that explains what WELTAY does and for whom, covering the 'Whatever Life Throws At You' positioning.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Value proposition signed off by Founder and recorded in Project Knowledge.
deliverables.notes: Wording finalised after two review rounds.
deliverables.founderActionDescription: Update Project Knowledge with the approved value proposition wording so all later work references the same source.

deliverables.title: Life milestones taxonomy v1
deliverables.description: Define the first structured list of life milestones the app will support, such as buying a home, having children, retirement and redundancy.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Taxonomy reviewed against target personas and approved for prototype use.

deliverables.title: MVP feature scope definition
deliverables.description: Define the minimum feature set required for a credible WELTAY MVP, with an explicit cut line for features deferred to later phases.
deliverables.intendedOutput: Approved MVP scope with in/out list.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Scope reviewed by PM and approved by Founder.
deliverables.notes: Proposed cut line ready for Founder review.
deliverables.founderActionDescription: Review the proposed MVP scope and confirm the cut line before build planning continues.

deliverables.title: User onboarding flow wireframes
deliverables.description: Produce wireframes for the first-run onboarding flow, including milestone selection and risk attitude capture.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Wireframes cover all onboarding steps and pass internal review.

deliverables.title: Investment risk profiling model
deliverables.description: Design the model that translates user answers into a risk profile used to shape suggested allocations.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Model validated against adviser input and approved investment universe.

deliverables.title: Financial projection engine spec
deliverables.description: Specify the engine that projects user finances over time across milestones and scenarios.
deliverables.intendedOutput: Projection engine specification ready for handover.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Specification complete and handed over to build via Specialist Handover.
deliverables.notes: Needs handover to resolve model conflict (ISS-001).

deliverables.title: Subscription pricing model
deliverables.description: Define the subscription tiers and price points for WELTAY.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Tiers and prices agreed and reflected in the unit economics model.

deliverables.title: FCA regulatory boundary assessment
deliverables.description: Assess where WELTAY sits relative to the FCA boundary between guidance and regulated advice.
deliverables.intendedOutput: Regulatory boundary assessment with recommended positioning.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Assessment reviewed by Founder and positioning decision recorded.
deliverables.notes: Central to several linked RAAIDD items.
deliverables.founderActionDescription: Confirm whether WELTAY positions as guidance or regulated advice before any further investment logic is built.

deliverables.title: Brand identity and tone of voice
deliverables.description: Establish the WELTAY brand identity, including logo direction, colour palette and tone of voice.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Brand guidelines approved by Founder.

deliverables.title: Go-to-market channel plan
deliverables.description: Identify and prioritise the channels WELTAY will use to reach early users and advisers.
deliverables.readinessGate: External Pitch / Adviser Review Readiness Gate
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Channel plan reviewed and approved for early outreach.

deliverables.title: Prototype clickable demo
deliverables.description: Build a clickable prototype demonstrating the core WELTAY journey for validation and pitch use.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Prototype covers the core journey and is ready for user interviews.

deliverables.title: Validation user interview plan
deliverables.description: Plan the user interviews that will validate the core WELTAY concept and assumptions.
deliverables.intendedOutput: Interview plan with participant criteria and script.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Plan approved and participants ready to recruit.

deliverables.title: Unit economics model
deliverables.description: Build the unit economics model covering acquisition cost, lifetime value and contribution by tier.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Model populated and validated against pricing assumptions.

deliverables.title: Adviser pitch deck
deliverables.description: Produce the pitch deck used to introduce WELTAY to financial advisers and early partners.
deliverables.readinessGate: External Pitch / Adviser Review Readiness Gate
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Deck complete and handed over for Founder use in outreach.
deliverables.founderActionDescription: Upload the latest adviser contact list to the shared drive so outreach can be scheduled.

deliverables.title: Data privacy and GDPR framework
deliverables.description: Define how WELTAY handles personal and financial data in line with UK GDPR.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Framework complete and legally signed off.

deliverables.title: Portfolio allocation logic
deliverables.description: Define the logic that maps a risk profile to a suggested portfolio allocation.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Logic reviewed by PM and consistent with risk profiling model.

deliverables.title: Competitor landscape analysis
deliverables.description: Map the competitive landscape of UK financial planning and milestone apps.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Analysis complete and shared with Founder.

deliverables.title: MVP technical architecture
deliverables.description: Define the technical architecture for the MVP, including the Open Banking integration approach.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Architecture reviewed and approved for build.

deliverables.title: Customer persona definitions
deliverables.description: Define the primary customer personas WELTAY will serve.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Personas validated and shared across workstreams.

deliverables.title: Early-stage financial forecast
deliverables.description: Produce an early high-level financial forecast for internal planning.
deliverables.intendedOutput: Early forecast (superseded by unit economics model).
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Forecast produced for initial planning only.
deliverables.notes: Superseded by DEL-013. Retained for reference.

deliverables.title: Initial scoping workshop notes
deliverables.description: Notes from the initial WELTAY scoping workshop.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Notes captured and stored.

deliverables.title: Accessibility standards baseline
deliverables.description: Establish the accessibility standard WELTAY will design and build to.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: Standard agreed and referenced in design guidance.

deliverables.title: [TEST WARNING] Invalid status and priority plus one-way link
deliverables.description: Deliberate test-warning record. Not a real Deliverable. Used to test invalid status, invalid priority and one-way link detection.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: N/A test record.
deliverables.notes: Deliberate test-warning record. ACT-004 does not link back, creating a one-way mismatch.

deliverables.title: [TEST WARNING] Missing founder action description, missing gate and broken link
deliverables.description: Deliberate test-warning record. Not a real Deliverable. Used to test missing founder action description, missing readiness gate and non-existent linked ID detection.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: N/A test record.
deliverables.notes: Deliberate test-warning record. RSK-999 does not exist.

deliverables.title: [TEST WARNING] Duplicate ID record A
deliverables.description: Deliberate test-warning record. Shares its ID with another record to test duplicate ID detection.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: N/A test record.

deliverables.title: [TEST WARNING] Duplicate ID record B
deliverables.description: Deliberate test-warning record. Shares its ID with another record to test duplicate ID detection.
deliverables.definitionOfDone: N/A test record.

raaidd.title: FCA may classify WELTAY as regulated advice
raaidd.description: There is a risk the FCA views WELTAY's guidance as crossing into regulated advice, which would change the regulatory burden significantly.
raaidd.notes: Drives the positioning decision in DEC-001.

raaidd.title: Investment model assumptions may be too aggressive
raaidd.description: The risk profiling model may produce allocations that are too aggressive for the target audience.
raaidd.notes: Mitigation through adviser review of allocation bands.

raaidd.title: Low early user retention
raaidd.description: Early users may not return after initial milestone setup, reducing validation signal.

raaidd.title: Reliance on a single adviser relationship
raaidd.description: The programme currently depends on one adviser relationship for investment input.
raaidd.outcome: Accepted for current phase; revisit before scale-up.

raaidd.title: UK users will pay a subscription for a planning tool
raaidd.description: We assume the target audience will pay a recurring subscription for WELTAY rather than expecting it free.
raaidd.notes: To be tested in validation interviews.

raaidd.title: Target users have moderate financial literacy
raaidd.description: We assume target users understand basic financial concepts without heavy education.

raaidd.title: Open Banking integration is feasible at MVP
raaidd.description: We assume Open Banking can be integrated within MVP scope and budget.
raaidd.notes: Now validated; control board JSON should reflect this.
raaidd.founderActionDescription: Update the control board JSON to reflect the validated Open Banking assumption and adjust any dependent items.

raaidd.title: Book FCA boundary consultation
raaidd.description: Arrange a consultation to confirm the regulatory boundary position.
raaidd.founderActionDescription: Founder to make the introduction to the FCA contact so the consultation can be booked.

raaidd.title: Finalise pricing tiers
raaidd.description: Confirm the final set of subscription tiers and prices.

raaidd.title: Recruit validation interview participants
raaidd.description: Find and book participants for the validation interviews.
raaidd.notes: Blocked until interview plan is approved.

raaidd.title: Register brand domain names
raaidd.description: Register the core WELTAY domain names.

raaidd.title: Conflicting projections between two models
raaidd.description: The projection engine and unit economics model currently produce inconsistent figures.
raaidd.notes: Affects both financial modelling and allocation logic.

raaidd.title: Brand name trademark check incomplete
raaidd.description: The trademark availability check for the brand name has not been completed.

raaidd.title: Missing data for unit economics
raaidd.description: Some inputs required for the unit economics model are not yet available.
raaidd.outcome: Inputs sourced from pricing assumptions and resolved.

raaidd.title: FCA guidance review outcome
raaidd.description: The positioning decision depends on the outcome of the FCA guidance review.

raaidd.title: Approved investment universe from adviser
raaidd.description: Both the risk profiling and allocation logic depend on an approved investment universe.

raaidd.title: Legal sign-off on GDPR framework
raaidd.description: The data privacy framework depends on external legal sign-off.

raaidd.title: Design system components from agency
raaidd.description: Prototype work depended on initial design system components from the agency.

raaidd.title: Position WELTAY as guidance, not regulated advice
raaidd.description: Proposed decision to position WELTAY as guidance rather than regulated advice, pending FCA review.
raaidd.founderActionDescription: Founder to ratify the positioning decision once the FCA review outcome is known.

raaidd.title: Adopt a subscription-first revenue model
raaidd.description: Decision to make subscription the primary revenue model for WELTAY.

raaidd.title: MVP excludes live trading
raaidd.description: Decision that the MVP will not include live trading or order execution.

raaidd.title: Defer pension module to phase 2
raaidd.description: Decision to defer the pension planning module to a later phase.

raaidd.title: [TEST WARNING] Invalid risk status and missing owner
raaidd.description: Deliberate test-warning record. Not a real RAAIDD item. Used to test invalid type-specific status and missing required field detection.
raaidd.notes: Deliberate test-warning record. 'Flagged' is not a valid Risk status and owner is missing.
